query:
SELECT p.*, u.email as ownerEmail, c.name as clientName
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN clients c ON p.clientId = c.id
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Oncor%' OR p.name LIKE '%Switch%';
